title: No Hurt Camera
description: Removes camera shake. Fork of UltraBlackLinux's NoHurtCam for Fabric 1.21.4+
body:
NoHurtCamera removes the hurt camera effect.

Fork of the original mod by UltraBlackLinux.

The original mod is abandoned. The author explicitly allows forks:
"Feel free to fork this, it's now abandoned." - UltraBlackLinux

Original: https://github.com/UltraBlackLinux/noHurtCam
License: AGPL-3.0 (same as original)

Updated to work on Fabric 1.21.4. More versions soon.

Command: /nohurtcam (toggles on/off)

Client-side only. No server needed.
